data.description:

An update from Beverly JCG Ltd. ( (SG:9QX) ) is now available.

Beverly JCG Ltd. has completed the issuance of subscription shares to Mark Phillip Jones, involving 61,728,395 shares at a price of S$0.0081 per share. This issuance increases the company’s total share count to 757,274,859 and is expected to be listed on the SGX-ST Catalist, enhancing the company’s financial position and market presence.

More about Beverly JCG Ltd.

Beverly JCG Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Republic of Singapore, involved in various business activities through its subsidiaries. The company primarily operates in sectors that involve share issuance and investment activities, as evidenced by recent transactions in the financial markets.

data.title: Henderson Investment Limited Issues Profit Warning with Increased Losses Expected
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Henderson Investment Limited ( (HK:0097) ) has shared an update.

Henderson Investment Limited has issued a profit warning, expecting a significant increase in losses for the year ending December 2024, with an anticipated loss of HK$125 million compared to HK$72 million in 2023. This projected increase is largely due to the cumulative effects of renewing shop lease agreements and the adverse impact of rising outbound travel and cross-border shopping on the Group’s financial performance.

More about Henderson Investment Limited

Henderson Investment Limited operates in the investment industry, focusing on managing a portfolio of assets and investments across various sectors. The company engages in leasing agreements and is influenced by market trends such as outbound travel and cross-border shopping.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €39.87M

Vistin Pharma ASA ( (DE:VP4) ) just unveiled an update.

Vistin Pharma ASA announced that it will release its fourth quarter and preliminary 2024 results on February 13, 2025. The company will host a conference call for shareholders and interested parties on the same day, featuring a management discussion and a Q&A session. This announcement highlights Vistin Pharma’s commitment to transparency and engagement with stakeholders, which may impact its market positioning and investor relations positively.

More about Vistin Pharma ASA

Vistin Pharma is a Norwegian pharmaceutical company specializing in the production of Metformin Hydrochloride, an active pharmaceutical ingredient (API). The company offers Metformin as Direct Compressible lubricated granules and is a key supplier to leading pharmaceutical companies in Europe. Headquartered in Oslo, Vistin Pharma operates a dedicated manufacturing facility in Kragerø.

An announcement from Salmon Evolution ASA ( (DE:60E) ) is now available.

Salmon Evolution ASA will present its fourth quarter 2024 results on February 11, 2025, at Hotel Continental in Oslo, with a webcast available for remote participants. The company’s innovative approach positions it strongly within the aquaculture industry, offering a controlled environment for salmon farming and aiming for considerable growth and international expansion.

More about Salmon Evolution ASA

Salmon Evolution is a global leader in land-based salmon farming, specializing in a hybrid flow-through system (HFS) that merges the benefits of land-based and sea-based farming. With a strategic location in Norway’s aquaculture hub, the company aims for significant international expansion, supported by its operational facility and global center of excellence.

data.title: PageGroup Transfers Share Plan Administration to Global Shares
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest update is out from PageGroup ( (GB:PAGE) ).

PageGroup plc has appointed Global Shares Ireland Limited, a J.P. Morgan company, as the new administrator for the company’s share plans. As part of this transition, all employee share accounts previously managed by Apex Group Fiduciary Services Limited have been transferred to Global Shares Execution Services Limited. This transfer includes shares held by the company’s Chief Financial Officer, Kelvin Stagg. Notably, the transfer does not alter the beneficial ownership of the shares, implying no immediate financial impact on stakeholders.

More about PageGroup

Sabana Shari’ah Compliant Industrial REIT ( (SG:M1GU) ) has issued an announcement.

Sabana Industrial REIT has announced plans to convene an extraordinary general meeting (EGM) following a request from a group of unitholders holding more than 10% of the trust’s units. This meeting will address specific resolutions proposed by these unitholders. The details of the EGM, including its date, time, and location, will be communicated to all unitholders in due course, and they are advised to exercise caution with their units until further announcements are made.

More about Sabana Shari’ah Compliant Industrial REIT

Sabana Industrial Real Estate Investment Trust (Sabana Industrial REIT) is a real estate investment trust established in 2010 under Singaporean law. It primarily focuses on the industrial real estate sector, managing a portfolio of properties to provide returns for its unitholders.

data.title: Dragon Mining Secures New Environmental Permit for Jokisivu Gold Mine
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Dragon Mining ( (HK:1712) ) has provided an announcement.

Dragon Mining Limited has secured a new Environmental Permit for its Jokisivu Gold Mine in southern Finland. This permit allows the company to crush up to 350,000 tonnes of aggregates annually, including ore and waste rock, with provisions to mitigate noise and dust pollution. The permit also amends regulations on water discharge, requiring more frequent monitoring of water quality and approving the closure of the Arpola open pit. The decision, effective immediately for crushing, is subject to an appeal period ending on March 6, 2025.

More about Dragon Mining

Dragon Mining Limited is a company incorporated in Western Australia that operates in the mining industry, primarily focusing on gold extraction and production. It is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the Stock Code 1712.
